title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: An IBM podcast episode discussing how software engineering roles are changing due to AI adoption, the phenomenon of companies exhausting AI budgets rapidly (tokenmaxxing), NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip for running large models on personal computers, and challenges for universities integrating AI literacy into curricula as students enter transformed workplaces.
